scripts.check: npm run check:js && npm run check:types && npm run test:js && npm run check:i18n && npm run check:python
scripts.check:types: tsc --noEmit --allowJs --checkJs --module NodeNext --moduleResolution NodeNext --target ES2022 --skipLibCheck --strict src/lib/normalizers/statistics.js src/lib/normalizers/swiss.js src/lib/normalizers/trenord.js src/lib/normalizers/viaggiatreno.js
scripts.check:python: python -m py_compile rfi-proxy/app.py rfi-proxy/statistics/app.py && python -m unittest discover -s tests/python
